brand_identity.name: CrossCurrent Finance Center
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Bloomberg Terminal density with Consumer Fintech polish
Data Density: High information density but with clear hierarchy
Dark Mode First: Optimized for low-light environments and long sessions
Visual Feedback: Immediate reaction to every interaction (hover, click, update)

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, KPI values

mono.usage: Financial data, tabular numbers, wallet addresses, API keys

dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 p-4 md:p-6

cards.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md shadow-xl rounded-xl
cards.highlight: bg-gradient-to-br from-zinc-800/80 to-zinc-900/80 border border-blue-500/20 shadow-blue-900/10 rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] border border-blue-400/20 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-600 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-blue-500/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 rounded-lg text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 transition-all

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 font-medium bg-zinc-900/50

assets.icons: Use Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons for specific trading metaphors

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure 'Manrope' and 'JetBrains Mono' are imported in index.css or via Google Fonts.
2. THEME: Apply the 'dark' class to the root HTML element by default. Do not rely on system preference alone.
3. LAYOUT: Use the 'Control Room Grid' for the main dashboard. Sidebar on left (collapsible), Header on top, Main content in the center.
4. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'component_styles' defined above. Remove default rounded-md and use rounded-lg or rounded-xl.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style them with the 'semantic' colors defined in the palette. Ensure tooltips have the 'glassmorphism' style.
6. DATA: All financial data must use the 'mono' font family for alignment.
7. INTERACTION: Add hover states to all rows in tables and all cards. Use 'transition-all duration-200'.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text on dark backgrounds meets contrast ratios. Use 'text-zinc-400' for secondary text, not darker.
9. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic centered layouts or default Shadcn styles without customization.
Depth: Use z-index and shadows to create depth. The dashboard should feel layered, not flat.
Motion: Micro-interactions are mandatory. Buttons should scale slightly on press. Lists should stagger in.
Spacing: Use 'gap-6' or 'gap-8' between major sections. Don't cram content.
Toasts: Use 'sonner' for notifications. Style them to match the dark theme (black bg, white text, colored border).
